LanguageData.ME_LokiPistol.label: Loki Pistol
LanguageData.ME_LokiPistol.description: A specialised M3 predator pistol used by LOKI mechs, does not appear to use thermal clips. Do not under any circumstance tell your mech to drop its weapon.
LanguageData.ME_LokiPistol.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.ME_LokiPistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.ME_LokiPistol.tools.1.label: muzzle
